summary: Added geodesic sphere, nested solids, and dual polyhedra generators with GenerationMode type and seed-derived mode selection. Geodesic uses extractEdgesFromNonIndexed for correct edge counts (30*(level+1)^2). Nested generates 2-4 concentric rotated copies. Dual overlays shape+dual pairs (icosa↔dodeca, cube↔octa, tetra↔tetra). Added 'cube' to PolyhedronShape (excluded from SHAPES selection array). Added maxEdgesPerShape to QualityProfile (low=30, medium=480, high=1920). Used EdgesGeometry threshold=1 for correct geometric edge counts. Wired generation modes into wireframePolyhedra.ts with tier-gated access (low=plain only). All 76 new tests and 60 existing tests pass. Build succeeds.
